entries.d: A friendly name for your parent's sister
entries.s: My _____ always brings me a present when she visits.

entries.d: Quiet and not nervous or angry
entries.s: The teacher told us to stay _____ and sit down.

entries.d: A girl or woman that someone is dating
entries.s: My brother's _____ came to our house for dinner.

entries.d: To feel very good about what you or someone else did
entries.s: She was _____ her drawing because it looked great.

entries.d: The ability to find things funny and make others laugh
entries.s: My dad has a great _____. He makes everyone laugh.

entries.d: Not nice to look at
entries.s: The old building was grey and _____.

entries.d: A tiny thing that can make you sick
entries.s: I caught a _____ and had to stay in bed for three days.

entries.d: To take air in and out through your nose or mouth
entries.s: It is hard to _____ when you run very fast.

entries.d: To make fire, or to get hurt by fire or something hot
entries.s: We _____ wood to make a warm fire in the garden.

entries.d: A language that is not the one you speak at home
entries.s: Learning a _____ can be hard but also a lot of fun.

entries.d: To feel very scared and not know what to do
entries.s: Don't _____ or start shouting! I will help you find your lost bag — just stay calm.

entries.d: A big machine with big wheels that farmers use
entries.s: The farmer drove his _____ across the field.

entries.d: Something you hold in your hand to build or fix things
entries.s: A hammer is a _____ you hold in your hand to put nails into wood.

entries.d: When two married people have ended their marriage
entries.s: His parents are _____ and he lives with his mum.

entries.d: To be in the same family as someone
entries.s: Are you _____ the new boy in class? He has the same last name.

entries.d: To remove something, like a file or message
entries.s: I _____ the old photos from my phone yesterday. They are gone forever now.

entries.d: A place on your computer where you keep documents or pictures
entries.s: I saved my homework in a _____ on the computer.

entries.d: To make a paper copy of something from the computer
entries.s: Can you _____ this document for me on paper? I need to read it at the table.

entries.d: For everyone, not just one person
entries.s: The library is a _____ place — anyone can go there.

entries.d: Moving on a frozen surface wearing special shoes with blades
entries.s: We went _____ at the rink in the city centre.

entries.d: When something bad is because of you
entries.s: It was my _____ that we were late. I forgot my bag.

entries.d: You want this to happen and think it will
entries.s: _____ it will be sunny for our school trip tomorrow.
